examples.title: NFA Acceptance Algorithm
examples.description: Algorithm to check if NFA accepts a given input string
examples.explanation: This simulates NFA computation by maintaining a set of possible current states. At each input symbol, it computes all possible next states and applies ε-closure. String is accepted if any final state is reachable at the end.

examples.title: Powerset Construction (NFA to DFA)
examples.description: Algorithm to convert NFA to equivalent DFA
examples.explanation: The algorithm iterates through all possible state sets, computing transitions for each input symbol. Each DFA state represents a subset of NFA states. ε-closure is applied to handle ε-transitions properly.

examples.title: ε-Closure Computation
examples.description: Algorithm to compute ε-closure of a set of NFA states
examples.explanation: Uses DFS/BFS approach to find all states reachable through ε-transitions. Includes the original states themselves (zero ε-transitions). Essential preprocessing step in NFA to DFA conversion.
